title: Remove Muliple Login Accounts

posts.author: aziz0731 (Aziz Rehman)
posts.cookedHtml: As a contractor serving various clients and offering support on Monday.com, I’ve finished a project and now aim to remove the corresponding account from the platform’s account switcher. Similarly, upon signing in via the Monday.com URL, I encounter a list of accounts I’m already logged into, which I need to remove. Could you please provide assistance with these actions?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Aziz,

Just to check, you’d like to remove your email from previously created monday.com accounts?

posts.author: aziz0731 (Aziz Rehman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to remove the accounts which I am logged into so it does not show up. Please see the attached screenshot
